race.comment: IN LIMBO (6) led and just failed to hold on over today's trip at Hawkesbury two runs ago. Dropped back to 1200m at Newcastle last start but was left a bit flat when they quickened. In the right race to bounce back to form. MISSILE MAGNATE (1) went back from a wide draw before rallying late to get up for second last time out over 1200m at Gosford. Can settle a bit closer from the better gate and at the third run back over an extra 100m and will be at his peak. SERPICO (4) had an 11-week spell before recording a barnstorming maiden win over 1350m at this track five weeks ago. Kept fresh which might be the key to him. Capable of a repeat performance. The speedy EASIEST CHOICE (3) comes here off a seven-week freshen up. Lightly raced mare with a strong SP profile so must be considered.
